The $AAPL iPhone 12 has been crowned the world’s best-selling 5G smartphone model in October despite a delayed launch. The iPhone 12 Pro cam in 2nd & the Samsung Samsung Galaxy Note 20 Ultra 5G followed in third place (was the best selling 5G device in Sept).

Combined Apple captured 24% of the market. 1/3rd of sales were in the US and China & Japan also saw strong initial demand for the iPhone 12 series.

Compared to most of the other 5G models, which have a regional presence, the iPhone 12 has a wider market coverage – it is available in over 140 countries, thus helping sales.

根據最新的爆料指，新款 Mac 產品預定於 3 月發佈，將搭載 12 核心 Apple Silicon 晶片。至於關於這款 Mac 規格，在爆料中並無給出細節，但若以知名分析師郭明錤的說法，可能會是 14.1″ 與 16″ MacBook Pro。同時有猜測認為，14″ 或搭載 12 核心處理器、16″ 則升級至 16 核心處理器。不同於 x86 架構，ARM 晶片對於增加核心更容易，同時功耗亦能壓得住。
